content: Path validation added to all MCP tool handlers — validateProjectPath() resolves path, checks allowlist [/home/, /tmp/], verifies directory. Prevents path traversal on projectPath inputs.
Secret guard agent redacts matchedContent in MCP responses to prevent secret exfiltration through the protocol. Only first 20 chars shown.
Deviation enforcer wraps new RegExp() in try/catch and skips patterns >500 chars to prevent ReDoS from malicious DB-sourced regex.
Correction analyzer threshold: 3+ occurrences across 2+ projects triggers auto-rule generation. Rules created with source='auto_correction' and no detectionRegex (operator must add manually).

Health score formula: start at 100, -15 per critical security, -8 per high, -3 per medium, -1 per low, -2 per contract mismatch, -5 per import error, -10 per secret finding. Grade: A>=90, B>=80, C>=70, D>=60, F<60.
Feature 6 (Knowledge-Driven Project Onboarding) deferred to Phase 4 per PRD priority — low effort, low urgency relative to other features.
Contract check match rate improved from ~17.5% to 70.8% on stackquadrant after adding NestJS controller prefix, FastAPI router prefix, and centralized API client baseURL resolution.
Deviation enforcer successfully loaded 161 rules from catalog. Rules stored in SQLite deviation_rules table with regex detection for FE/BE/DB/TS/SEC/AUTH/ERR/LLM prefixes.
5 new MCP tools registered: sf_secret_guard, sf_import_validator, sf_deviation_enforcer, sf_contract_check, sf_query_corrections. All integrated into nightly harvest pipeline.
